author: kevaundray
content:
Continuing the conversation from the call here.

<@912415191067676693> / <@628018527470616606> not sure if you need more eyes on the Nethermind ssz library, if so please let me know. Note also that [NewPayloadRequestRoot](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/31b9c3e15e1d4a31cc59891dbb505e51d13403ad/src/ethereum/forks/amsterdam/stateless.py#L151) requires ssz anyways

author: kevaundray
content: <@976542403269910539>   I believe you were mentioning doing some preprocessing to the input; I’d suggest to follow the spec which is currently ssz and then you can make a proposal to add this preprocessing/custom once you’ve shown it to be fast enough to warrant everyone else implement it

author: kevaundray
content: Another thing to note is that the specs take in the [ExecutionPayload](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/31b9c3e15e1d4a31cc59891dbb505e51d13403ad/src/ethereum/forks/amsterdam/execution_engine/types.py#L78) as input and not the EL block. Its essentially input from the CL and the output will be given back to the CL
